recommended_actions.action: ISS-836 (critical): Analyst must rewrite WIN-010 text to reflect Self-Contradicted verdict. Current text says Non-discriminating — directly contradicts displayed verdict badge. High reader confusion risk.

ISS-825 (open): Human decision required on WIN-018 verdict flip in EXP-050. Curmudgeon reviewed EXP-050-r2 and flagged the analemma flip as unsupported. Decider cannot self-adjudicate — this needs human eyes.
ISS-837 (major): Analyst recount gravity-related WINs in current set (70 total, 69 dome WINs) and update SEC-1.7 headings. 49% was calculated from 67 WINs — current denominator makes it ~47%.
64 pending curmudgeon reviews need decider processing. Current run handled critical WIN-010 and stale SEC-1.1. Next run: focus on HOL-* and EXEC-SUMMARY major findings (narrative/taxonomy issues).
